title: Working from home
explanation:
Working from home

More people work from home today than ten years ago. You need a quiet room, a good internet connection and a comfortable chair. Many workers start at nine and finish at five, but they save time because they don't travel to an office. Some people miss talking to colleagues face to face. Experts say it is important to take breaks and go outside during the day.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: More people work from home than [*ten years ago|last month|never].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Read and choose the correct option.

questions.text: You need a ____ room to work. | *quiet | noisy | empty
Some people miss colleagues ____ to face. | *face | back | hand
Workers should go ____ during the day. | *outside | inside | away
You need a comfortable ____. | *chair | bus | museum

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Read the text and choose the correct answer.

questions.text: Many home workers keep [*normal|night|no] office hours.
questions.feedback: Start at nine, finish at five.
